{{Quote|Die, fool!|Dekker|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''Dekker''' was a courier working for [[Borvo]] the Hutt on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] Dekker was delivering a sample of the [[Berserker Virus]], a [[Bioweapon/Legends|bioweapon]] developed by Borvo's organization, to some [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] buyers when he was intercepted by an agent of local criminal [[Kritus Morven]]. After a short exchange of [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] fire, Dekker was killed and the bioweapon sample fell into Morven's hands.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:BorvoNPCTemplate.png|250px|thumb|Every possible depiction of Dekker]]
Dekker was a non-player character (NPC) in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' that was spawned somewhere outside of [[Keren/Legends|Keren]] when the player accepts Kritus Morven's fourth mission.

*{{GalaxiesAED}} {{1st}}
